title: phyllanthus benguetensis
intro: Phyllanthus benguetensis, also known as the Benguet spineless starfruit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a shrub native to the Philippines, particularly in the province of Benguet, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, and has been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus benguetensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
